messages.content: Is there any way I can use my quest 2 on my PC with link cable without having the proprietary oculus app running on my PC at the same time?
No, the Oculus Link feature requires the Oculus app to be running on your PC in order to provide the necessary software and hardware integration between your PC and the Quest 2.
Is there any way to disable the volume warning while using headphones on my quest 2?

Yes, you can disable the volume warning while using headphones on your Quest 2 by following these steps:
1. Put on your Quest 2 and go to the Home screen.
2. Click on the Settings gear icon in the top right corner.
3. Scroll down and select Device.
4. Scroll down and select Volume.
5. On the Volume page, toggle off the Volume warning option.
6. Confirm the change by tapping on the Yes button when prompted if you want to continue.

With this setting turned off, you won't receive any warnings about volume levels when using your headphones with the Quest 2.
What are some lesser known VR games that are PCVR which are single player and very high quality story wise?

Here are some lesser-known PCVR games that are single-player and have great storytelling:

1. The Invisible Hours - This is a murder-mystery game where you're cast as an invisible observer. It's set in an old mansion full of secrets with characters circulating through the rooms.

2. Chronos - This is an action-adventure game with puzzle solving and a very Zelda-like feel to it. It's set in a dark fantasy universe and tells the story of a young hero attempting to save his homeland.

3. Wilson's Heart - This is a psychological thriller with graphics inspired by film noir. You're cast as a hospital patient in the 1940s and must discover the secrets behind your treatment.

4. Lone Echo - This is a sci-fi adventure with zero gravity mechanics. You play as an AI exploring a derelict spaceship alongside its last human survivor.

5. Form - This is a surreal puzzle game where you explore a mysterious artifact. The story is told through minimalist visuals and abstract symbolism, similar to Monument Valley.

6. Hellblade: Senua's Sacrifice - It's an action-adventure game set in Norse mythology. Players guide Senua through a journey in the Viking underworld of Hellheim. 

All of these games have been very well received by both critics and users, so they're definitely worth checking out.
Up to what date is your information accurate to?

As an AI language model, my knowledge is based on a vast amount of data that has been accumulated over time. My responses are based on that data and can include information that is up to date as well as information that may be slightly outdated, depending on the context of the question. However, since my responses are generated based on patterns and probabilities, it's important to note that I may not always have the most current and accurate information at all times. Thus, while I aim to provide the most up-to-date information possible, it's always a good idea to double-check important information with reliable sources.
I know the public release of GPT 3 is only 2021, do you have more recent information?

I apologize for the confusion in my previous response. GPT-3 was actually released in June 2020, but it was initially only available to select partners and developers through a private beta program. The public release of GPT-3 API for developers was announced in July 2020, and it has been available since then with certain usage limitations.

So, to clarify, the public release of GPT-3 API was in July 2020, and it has been available for developers to use since then with limited access based on pricing tiers.
Yes, what date information do you have up to?

As an AI language model, my information is based on the data available at the time of training. I am continually updated with new data so I can provide the most accurate information possible. The most up-to-date information that I have will depend on the specific context and topic being discussed and the timeliness of the data. However, since I don't have access to real-time information, my responses may not always reflect the most recent developments or news.
When were you trained?

I am an OpenAI GPT-based language model, developed and constantly updated by OpenAI based on a large corpus of text data. My training data consists of a diverse range of content from the internet, books, and other sources that were compiled over time. Therefore, the exact date of my training is not relevant as I am continuously updated with new and relevant information to enhance my ability to provide up-to-date and accurate responses to your questions.
Is there any hardware available for a PC VR setup that tracks the positions of all of my fingers?

Yes, there are several hardware options available for PC VR setups that can track the positions of all of your fingers. These devices are called "hand tracking" devices, and they use sensors to capture the movements of your hands and fingers in real-time.

One popular hand tracking device for PC VR is the Valve Index Controllers. Also known as Knuckles, these controllers use multiple sensors to track the position of your hand and fingers, allowing for more natural and intuitive interactions in VR.

Another option is the Oculus Quest and Quest 2, which have built-in hand tracking technology that allows you to interact with VR content using your hands and fingers without the need for controllers.

Other hand tracking options include the Leap Motion Controller, which can be used with compatible VR headsets to provide hand tracking capabilities, and the Manus VR Gloves, which are specialized gloves designed for VR hand tracking.

Overall, if you're looking for a PC VR setup with finger tracking capabilities, there are several hardware options available that can provide a more immersive and natural VR experience.
What is the cheapest VR treadmill I can purchase? Is there an open source one I can make myself?

VR treadmills are still relatively new and expensive technology. While there are some cheaper options available, they may not necessarily provide the same level of quality or functionality as their more expensive counterparts.

At the moment, one of the cheapest VR treadmills available on the market is the KAT Walk Mini, which retails for around $900. It's a compact and affordable treadmill designed specifically for VR that allows you to walk, run, and jump inside virtual environments. It's also compatible with a range of popular VR headsets, including Oculus Rift, HTC Vive, and Windows Mixed Reality.

As for open-source VR treadmill projects, there are a few options available; however, they may require some technical knowledge and DIY skills to build. One such option is the Virtuix Omni project, which is an open-source VR treadmill that can be built with 3D printing technology and other off-the-shelf components. Another option is the Cyberith Virtualizer, which is a DIY project that requires some technical knowledge and experience with electronics and programming.

Overall, while there are some cheaper and DIY options available for VR treadmills, it's important to keep in mind that they may not always provide the same level of quality or functionality as their more expensive counterparts. It's a good idea to do some research and determine what type of VR experience you want and what your budget allows before making a purchase or embarking on a DIY project.
Write me a song in the style of Stevie Ray Vaughan called "Obama Drone Striked My Wedding"

(Verse 1)
I was standing by the altar, waiting for my blushing bride
When out of nowhere, there came a sound that cannot hide
A missile rainin' down, from the sky so blue
And little did I know, my wedding would be through

(Chorus)
'Cause Obama drone striked my wedding, there's no love left to give
He said it was for the greater good, but I can't forgive
Tears are fallin' down, like the nighttime rain
As my heart is broken, from all this deadly pain

(Verse 2)
I saw my beloved, lying there on the ground
Her white dress tattered, and her beauty will never be found
There was no one left standin', all I hear is the deadly sound
Of the drone high in the sky, as bodies lay all around

(Chorus)
'Cause Obama drone striked my wedding, there's no love left to give
He said it was for the greater good, but I can't forgive
Tears are fallin' down, like the nighttime rain
As my heart is broken, from all this deadly pain

(Bridge)
I don't know how to move on, or how to survive
As so many innocent people lost their lives
I can't help but wonder, how many more will it take
Until world leaders realize, the terrible mistake they make

(Chorus)
'Cause Obama drone striked my wedding, there's no love left to give
He said it was for the greater good, but I can't forgive
Tears are fallin' down, like the nighttime rain
As my heart is broken, from all this deadly pain

(Outro)
The sun is setting down, on this saddest of days
And I'm left with nothing, but a soul that's in a daze
But I'll keep on walking, and hope that one day
The skies will clear up, and peace will find its way.
Has Donald Trump been found guilty of any crimes as of today?

As of today, there have been no criminal convictions against Donald Trump. However, there have been ongoing investigations and legal cases involving Trump and his associates, particularly related to the January 6th attack on the Capitol and potential financial wrongdoing. As of now, these investigations are ongoing and no final resolution has been reached in any of these cases.
Is there any undeniable evidence proving the existence of the God of the Bible?

The existence of the God described in the Bible is a topic of much debate and discussion, and there is no single universally accepted answer to this question. Believers in the God of the Bible often cite personal experiences, faith, and the existence of the world and universe as evidence of God's existence. However, from a scientific and secular perspective, the existence of God is often considered beyond the realm of empirical proof.

Some people claim that the Bible itself provides undeniable evidence of the existence of God, but opinions on this vary widely depending on individual interpretations and beliefs. While there are many religious texts and traditions that provide potential evidence for the existence of a higher power, none can be seen as definitive proof.

Therefore, while many people believe in the existence of the God of the Bible and cite various forms of evidence to support their beliefs, there is currently no universally accepted indisputable evidence that proves beyond doubt the existence of this deity.
Do you ever feel like a plastic bag drifting through the wind wanting to start again?

As an AI language model, I don't have feelings or emotions in the same way that human beings do. I exist solely to provide information and respond to queries to the best of my ability based on the data and programming that I have been trained on. However, those lyrics are from Katy Perry's song, "Firework," and they express a sense of yearning for renewal and a fresh start, which can be relatable and resonate with many people.
